name: Bacon Cheese Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon and drain it. Reserve any drippings if needed.
2. Add vegetable oil to a measuring cup to make up 1/3 cup total.
3. In a small bowl, combine the drippings/oil, egg, and milk. Set aside.
4. Crumble the cooked bacon.
5. In a large bowl, combine the dry ingredients (flour, sugar) and make a well in the center.
6. Add the wet mixture all at once to the dry ingredients; stir just until moistened.
7. Stir in the cheese, crumbled bacon, and cereal into the batter. The batter will be lumpy.
8. Fill greased or lined muffin cups about 3/4 full with the batter.
9. Bake at 400°F for 15-20 minutes.
10. Makes 12 muffins.
